headline: Intuitive Surgical’s European Push And Cardiac Clearance Tested By Lofty Valuation
summary: Intuitive Surgical has completed the acquisition of da Vinci and Ion distribution businesses in several Southern European countries. The company has received FDA clearance for its da Vinci 5 system for use in certain cardiac surgeries. These developments expand Intuitive Surgical's direct reach in Europe and broaden approved uses of its surgical system in the United States. For investors watching Intuitive Surgical, ticker NasdaqGS:ISRG, these moves come with the share price at $501.18 and...
